summary: Orchestrator skills (setup-brand, onboard-brand, ingest-resource) rewired to the canonical write channel. Security scan added to write-to-context for prompt injection, credential exfil, ssh keys, invisible unicode, destructive shell patterns.
notes: Safe overlay. No schema change, no path change. The security scan can refuse writes that previously passed — review `.phantom/context-engine-events.jsonl` for `op: refused` entries if a skill suddenly starts failing after install.

changes.note: Step 3 origin_story write — pseudo-code `write_to_context()` replaced with explicit Bash call to .skills/write-to-context.py with mutation-guard callout.
Step 3 delegate-to-ingest-resource — pseudo-code routed-write clarified to explicit python3 .skills/write-to-context.py invocation, with mode-proposed-dicts-only rule.
Step 3B Write Brand Context — replaced loose `Write file to brand folder` bullet with full canonical-channel block (Bash template, mode rules, workflow-gate pointer to stage-proposal.py).

Added SECURITY_PATTERNS + scan_string + scan_value. main() runs the scan on --value and --reason before workflow-gate check; on any match, refuses the write, appends a `refused` event to events.jsonl, and exits 1 with the list of matches.

post_steps: No action required per brand — security scan runs on every write going forward.
